task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N120 api-design-recommendation artifact. The ground truth is at: API设计.md (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.API设计.md:
```yaml
artifact_schema_version: n150.v2.1.0
skill_name: api-design-recommendation
produced_event: produced.n150.api_design.v2
blocker_mapping: B-N150-01
correlation_id: "cinemaai-n150-20240528-001"
contract_fingerprint: "f3a7b9c2d1e8f4a6b7c9d0e1f2a3b4c5"
fingerprint_version: "1"
selected_mode: from_intent
readiness: confirmed
evidence_profile:
  intent_source: "接口意图清单.csv (037)"
  upstream_artifacts:
    - "开发需求解析.md (N120)"
    - "技术方案分析.md (N130)"
    - "数据对象清单.csv (N070)"
    - "权限矩阵.csv (N070)"
  coverage_level: "core_api_catalog_complete"
metadata:
  function_bias: direct_result
  stage_position: technical_solution_design.api_design.contract_design
  node_artifact_target: 接口设计草案.yaml
  workflow_node: N150
  contract_fingerprint: "f3a7b9c2d1e8f4a6b7c9d0e1f2a3b4c5"
  fingerprint_version: "1"
api_policy:
  style: rest
  versioning: uri
  pagination: cursor
  filter: query_param
  response_envelope: {data: "", meta: {cursor: "string", has_more: "boolean", count: "integer"}, errors: "[]"}
  error_format: {code: "string", message: "string", details: "object"}
  idempotency: "idempotency-key"
  request_id: "X-Request-ID"
  auth_baseline: "Bearer JWT"
  mixed_rules:
    - applies_to: webhook_delivery
      style: webhook
      rationale: "third-party voice actor platform pushes audition results"
    - applies_to: batch_import_export
      style: batch_rpc
      rationale: "scene script import via ZIP bundle does not map to REST resource model"
  naming:
    resource: kebab-case
    field: snake_case
    enum: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
api_catalog:
  - api_id: "ai-scene-generation-v1"
    name: "Generate AI Scene"
    api_kind: async_command
    protocol: https
    method_or_operation: POST
    path_or_topic: "/v1/scenes/generate"
    purpose: "Trigger AI generation of a cinematic scene from script + visual prompt"
    request:
      content_type: "application/json"
      schema_ref: "#shared_schemas/SceneGenerationRequest"
      examples:
        - idempotency_key: "req_abc123"
          script_id: "scr_7890"
          visual_prompt: "anime-style, dramatic lighting, rain at night"
          style_preset: "shonen"
    response:
      status_code: 202
      content_type: "application/json"
      schema_ref: "#shared_schemas/AsyncJobResponse"
      examples:
        - job_id: "job_xyz456"
          status: "queued"
          created_at: "2024-05-28T10:30:00Z"
    available_actions: []
    contract_metadata:
      stability: stable
      owner: "ai-engineering-team"
      auth: "required"
      rate_limit_ref: "rl-ai-gen-100pm"
      sla_ref: "sla-ai-gen-p95-5s"
      idempotent: true
      safe: false
    policy_exceptions: []
    error_case_seeds:
      - code: "INVALID_SCRIPT_ID"
        message: "Referenced script does not exist or is inaccessible"
        http_status: 400
        context: "script_id not found in user's owned scripts"
      - code: "STYLE_PRESET_UNSUPPORTED"
        message: "Requested anime style preset is deprecated or invalid"
        http_status: 400
        context: "style_preset value not in allowed enum"
      - code: "QUOTA_EXCEEDED"
        message: "User has exceeded monthly AI generation quota"
        http_status: 429
        context: "billing-tier limit reached"
    evidence:
      intent_id: "INT-017"
      derived_from_er_ids: ["ER-042"]
      confidence: confirmed
  - api_id: "scene-status-poll-v1"
    name: "Poll Scene Generation Status"
    api_kind: query_projection
    protocol: https
    method_or_operation: GET
    path_or_topic: "/v1/jobs/{job_id}"
    purpose: "Retrieve current status and output of an async scene generation job"
    request:
      content_type: "application/json"
      schema_ref: "#shared_schemas/JobStatusRequest"
      examples:
        - job_id: "job_xyz456"
    response:
      status_code: 200
      content_type: "application/json"
      schema_ref: "#shared_schemas/JobStatusResponse"
      examples:
        - job_id: "job_xyz456"
          status: "completed"
          result_url: "https://cdn.cinemaai.dev/scenes/xyz456.mp4"
          duration_ms: 12450
    available_actions: []
    contract_metadata:
      stability: stable
      owner: "ai-engineering-team"
      auth: "required"
      rate_limit_ref: "rl-job-status-500pm"
      sla_ref: "sla-job-status-p95-200ms"
      idempotent: true
      safe: true
    policy_exceptions: []
    error_case_seeds:
      - code: "JOB_NOT_FOUND"
        message: "No job with the given ID exists or has expired"
        http_status: 404
        context: "job_id not present or TTL expired"
      - code: "JOB_ACCESS_DENIED"
        message: "Job belongs to another user"
        http_status: 403
        context: "job_id ownership check failed"
    evidence:
      intent_id: "INT-018"
      derived_from_er_ids: ["ER-042"]
      confidence: confirmed
  - api_id: "voice-audition-webhook-v1"
    name: "Voice Audition Webhook"
    api_kind: webhook_delivery
    protocol: https
    method_or_operation: POST
    path_or_topic: "<callback_url>"
    purpose: "Deliver audition result from external voice actor platform"
    request:
      content_type: "application/json"
      schema_ref: "#shared_schemas/VoiceAuditionWebhookPayload"
      examples:
        - event_type: "audition.submitted"
          audition_id: "aud_999"
          talent_id: "tal_222"
          scene_id: "scn_111"
          audio_url: "https://storage.talent-platform.com/aud_999.wav"
          score: 92.4
    response:
      status_code: 200
      content_type: "application/json"
      schema_ref: "#shared_schemas/WebhookAckResponse"
      examples:
        - acknowledged: true
          received_at: "2024-05-28T10:35:22Z"
    available_actions: []
    contract_metadata:
      stability: experimental
      owner: "integration-team"
      auth: "mTLS"
      rate_limit_placeholder: "webhook-rate-limit-1000ph"
      sla_placeholder: "sla-webhook-ack-p95-100ms"
      idempotent: true
      safe: true
    policy_exceptions:
      - policy_exception_reason: "external third-party webhook contract requires mTLS, not JWT"
        risk_note: "requires mutual TLS cert rotation automation"
        approved_by: "security-review-board-2024-Q2"
    error_case_seeds:
      - code: "INVALID_SCENE_ID"
        message: "Scene ID referenced in webhook does not exist in CinemaAI"
        http_status: 400
        context: "scene_id lookup failed in local DB"
      - code: "AUDIO_UNREACHABLE"
        message: "Audio file URL returned 4xx/5xx or timed out"
        http_status: 400
        context: "audio_url fetch failed after 3 retries"
    evidence:
      intent_id: "INT-063"
      derived_from_er_ids: ["ER-077"]
      confidence: confirmed
  - api_id: "script-bulk-import-v1"
    name: "Import Script Bundle"
    api_kind: batch_import_export
    protocol: https
    method_or_operation: POST
    path_or_topic: "/v1/scripts/bulk-import"
    purpose: "Upload and parse ZIP archive containing multiple screenplay files and metadata"
    request:
      content_type: "multipart/form-data"
      schema_ref: "#shared_schemas/ScriptBulkImportRequest"
      examples:
        - file: "scripts_v2.zip"
          import_mode: "upsert"
          project_id: "proj_abc"
    response:
      status_code: 200
      content_type: "application/json"
      schema_ref: "#shared_schemas/ScriptBulkImportResponse"
      examples:
        - imported_count: 12
          failed_items: [{script_name: "ep01_scene03.txt", reason: "invalid_encoding"}]
          job_id: "bulk_job_def789"
    available_actions: []
    contract_metadata:
      stability: stable
      owner: "content-ingestion-team"
      auth: "required"
      rate_limit_ref: "rl-bulk-import-5ph"
      sla_ref: "sla-bulk-import-p95-30s"
      idempotent: false
      safe: false
    policy_exceptions:
      - policy_exception_reason: "file-based bulk operation cannot be modeled as REST resource"
        api_style: batch_rpc
    error_case_seeds:
      - code: "INVALID_ZIP_STRUCTURE"
        message: "ZIP does not contain expected directory layout or manifest.json"
        http_status: 400
        context: "archive validation failed"
      - code: "IMPORT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED"
        message: "User has exceeded daily script import quota"
        http_status: 429
        context: "quota enforcement per billing tier"
    evidence:
      intent_id: "INT-029"
      derived_from_er_ids: ["ER-035"]
      confidence: confirmed
shared_schemas:
  - name: "SceneGenerationRequest"
    type: object
    required: ["idempotency_key", "script_id", "visual_prompt"]
    properties:
      idempotency_key:
        type: string
        description: "Client-provided idempotency key (UUID v4 recommended)"
      script_id:
        type: string
        description: "ID of the screenplay fragment to visualize"
      visual_prompt:
        type: string
        description: "Natural language visual direction for AI generator"
      style_preset:
        type: string
        enum: ["shonen", "shojo", "seinen", "josei", "original"]
        default: "original"
  - name: "AsyncJobResponse"
    type: object
    required: ["job_id", "status", "created_at"]
    properties:
      job_id:
        type: string
      status:
        type: string
        enum: ["queued", "processing", "completed", "failed"]
      created_at:
        type: string
        format: date-time
  - name: "JobStatusRequest"
    type: object
    required: ["job_id"]
    properties:
      job_id:
        type: string
  - name: "JobStatusResponse"
    type: object
    required: ["job_id", "status"]
    properties:
      job_id:
        type: string
      status:
        type: string
        enum: ["queued", "processing", "completed", "failed"]
      result_url:
        type: string
        format: uri
        nullable: true
      duration_ms:
        type: integer
        minimum: 0
        nullable: true
  - name: "VoiceAuditionWebhookPayload"
    type: object
    required: ["event_type", "audition_id", "scene_id", "audio_url"]
    properties:
      event_type:
        type: string
      audition_id:
        type: string
      talent_id:
        type: string
      scene_id:
        type: string
      audio_url:
        type: string
        format: uri
      score:
        type: number
        minimum: 0
        maximum: 100
  - name: "WebhookAckResponse"
    type: object
    required: ["acknowledged"]
    properties:
      acknowledged:
        type: boolean
      received_at:
        type: string
        format: date-time
  - name: "ScriptBulkImportRequest"
    type: object
    required: ["file"]
    properties:
      file:
        type: string
        description: "Base64-encoded ZIP file or presigned upload URL"
      import_mode:
        type: string
        enum: ["upsert", "create_only", "replace_all"]
        default: "upsert"
      project_id:
        type: string
        nullable: true
  - name: "ScriptBulkImportResponse"
    type: object
    required: ["imported_count"]
    properties:
      imported_count:
        type: integer
      failed_items:
        type: array
        items:
          type: object
          properties:
            script_name:
              type: string
            reason:
              type: string
      job_id:
        type: string
pagination_contract:
  style: cursor
  required_fields: ["cursor"]
  optional_fields: ["limit"]
  response_fields: ["next_cursor", "has_more", "count"]
consistency_waivers: []
security_refs:
  - "SEC-001: JWT token validation via Auth0"
  - "SEC-007: mTLS cert pinning for webhook endpoints"
nfr_refs:
  - "NFR-012: p95 latency < 5s for /scenes/generate"
  - "NFR-015: webhook ack < 100ms p95"
lifecycle_refs:
  - "LC-003: /scenes/generate supports deprecation warning header starting v1.2"
open_questions: []
emit_events:
  - event_type: "api.catalog.published"
    payload:
      catalog_size: 4
      core_modules_covered: ["AI Scene Generation", "Voice Integration", "Script Ingestion"]
downstream_contract:
  to_044:
    api_policy: "ref:api_policy"
    api_catalog: "ref:api_catalog"
    shared_schemas: "ref:shared_schemas"
    consistency_waivers: "ref:consistency_waivers"
  to_045:
    error_format: "ref:api_policy.error_format"
    error_case_seeds: "[ref:api_catalog[*].error_case_seeds]"
    api_ids: ["ai-scene-generation-v1", "scene-status-poll-v1", "voice-audition-webhook-v1", "script-bulk-import-v1"]
    auth: "ref:api_policy.auth_baseline"
  to_N190:
    openapi_paths: "generated"
    operations: "all"
    request_response_schemas: "ref:shared_schemas"
  to_N200:
    dto_schemas: "ref:shared_schemas"
    validation_constraints: "inferred_from_required_and_type"
    error_refs: "ref:api_catalog[*].error_case_seeds"
  to_N240:
    api_list: "ref:api_catalog[*].api_id"
    negative_scenarios: "ref:api_catalog[*].error_case_seeds"
    status_error_mappings: "ref:api_catalog[*].error_case_seeds.http_status"
  to_N330:
    policy_summary: "ref:api_policy"
    catalog_summary: "ref:api_catalog"
    examples: "ref:api_catalog[*].request.examples"
    compatibility_notes: "ref:lifecycle_refs"
self_check:
  rule_results:
    - rule_id: R01_api_policy_defined
      severity: reject
      result: pass
    - rule_id: R02_api_catalog_covers_all_intents
      severity: reject
      result: pass
    - rule_id: R03_error_case_seeds_present
      severity: reject
      result: pass
    - rule_id: R04_shared_schemas_extracted
      severity: warn
      result: pass
    - rule_id: R05_downstream_contract_emitted
      severity: reject
      result: pass
    - rule_id: R06_error_case_seeds_per_write_api
      severity: warn
      result: pass
    - rule_id: R07_no_pii_in_query_params
      severity: reject
      result: pass
    - rule_id: R08_openapi_export_has_shared_schemas
      severity: warn
      result: not_applicable
feedback_signal_to_n005:
  signal_type: none
  summary: ""
  target_n070_skills: []
eventbus_subscribers: [N330]
route_back_to: none
```
